business_type: Independent business consultant helping small companies improve operations and pricing
weekly_tasks_text: Research prospects on LinkedIn; send cold outreach emails; follow up with leads who did not respond; prepare discovery call notes; write client proposals; create slide decks for workshops; summarize client meetings; prepare invoices; publish LinkedIn posts twice per week; track active opportunities in a spreadsheet.
current_tools_text: Gmail, Google Docs, Google Slides, Google Sheets, LinkedIn, Calendly, Zoom, Stripe and PayPal for invoicing.
top_time_sinks_text: Writing custom proposals from scratch every time; summarizing long client meetings; remembering follow-ups across many leads; turning messy notes into polished client materials; creating consistent LinkedIn content.
error_sensitive_areas_text: Client pricing; proposal scope; confidential client notes; contract terms; invoice details.
customer_facing_areas_text: Outreach emails; discovery calls; proposals; workshop decks; follow-up emails; LinkedIn content.
primary_goal_text: Increase sales pipeline consistency and reduce time spent preparing proposals and follow-ups.
things_owner_refuses_to_automate_text: Final proposal approval; strategic recommendations to clients; sensitive negotiation emails; relationship-building messages to warm leads.
